name: Paneer Bake- Clawson
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large casserole dish, combine all ingredients.
2. Dissolve two of the vegetable stock cubes in water.
3. Pour the liquid into the vegetables and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Bake for three hours at 300 degrees F.
5. Dissolve the remaining stock cube in water and add it to the casserole during the last half hour of cooking.
